prompt: List all skills and descriptions. Focus on SEO and marketing skills.
content:
# Claude SEO — Skills & Ecosystem

## Core `/seo` Commands (25 sub-skills)

Based on the commands table and feature descriptions:

| Skill/Command | Description |
|---|---|
| `/seo audit <url>` | "Full website audit with parallel sub-agent delegation" |
| `/seo page <url>` | Deep single-page on-page analysis |
| `/seo technical <url>` | "Technical SEO audit across 9 categories" |
| `/seo content <url>` | E-E-A-T and content quality evaluation |
| `/seo content-brief <topic>` | Generates detailed content briefs with keyword targets, outlines, and internal links |
| `/seo schema <url>` | "Detect, validate, and generate Schema.org markup" |
| `/seo geo <url>` | "AI Overviews / Generative Engine Optimization" — scores AI-citation readiness |
| `/seo sitemap <url \| generate>` | Analyze or generate XML sitemaps |
| `/seo images <url>` | Image optimization analysis |
| `/seo plan <type>` | "Strategic SEO planning (saas, local, ecommerce, publisher, agency)" |
| `/seo programmatic <url>` | Programmatic SEO analysis and planning |
| `/seo competitor-pages <url>` | Competitor comparison page generation |
| `/seo local <url>` | "Local SEO analysis (GBP, citations, reviews, map pack)" |
| `/seo maps [command]` | Maps intelligence: geo-grid, GBP audit, reviews, competitor radius mapping |
| `/seo hreflang <url>` | Hreflang/international SEO audit and generation |
| `/seo google [command]` | "Google SEO APIs (GSC, PageSpeed, CrUX, Indexing, GA4, PDF reports)" |
| `/seo backlinks <url>` | Backlink profile analysis via Moz, Bing, Common Crawl |
| `/seo cluster <keyword>` | SERP-based semantic clustering |
| `/seo sxo <url>` | "Search Experience Optimization (page-type, user stories, personas)" |
| `/seo drift baseline \| compare \| history <url>` | "SEO drift monitoring with SQLite snapshots" |
| `/seo ecommerce <url>` | E-commerce SEO and marketplace intelligence |
| `/seo flow [stage]` | FLOW framework prompts (evidence-led, CC BY 4.0) |
| `/seo firecrawl [command] <url>` | Full-site crawling via Firecrawl (optional extension) |
| `/seo dataforseo [command]` | Live SERP, keyword, and backlink data (optional extension) |
| `/seo image-gen [use-case]` | AI image generation for OG previews, blog heroes, product photos (Banana extension) |

---

## Ecosystem Skills (Companion Tools)

| Skill | Purpose |
|---|---|
| **Claude Blog** | "Blog writing, optimization, scoring" — writes content optimized by SEO findings |
| **Claude Banana** | "AI image generation via Gemini" — generates SEO asset images |
| **Codex SEO** | Codex-first port with the "same SEO workflow surface" for non-Claude environments |
| **AI Marketing Claude** | "Copywriting, emails, social, ads, funnels, CRO" — post-audit marketing action |
| **FLOW** | "Evidence-led SEO framework (41 AI prompts, CC BY 4.0)" — powers the `/seo flow` commands |

---

## Underlying Agent Architecture

The skill runs **18 specialist agents** dispatched in parallel (up to 15 simultaneously) by an orchestrator that handles industry detection (SaaS, local, ecommerce, publisher, agency) and synthesizes findings through a **10-principle methodology** across four phases: PERCEIVE, ANALYZE, VALIDATE, and ACT. Each recommendation includes a falsifiability check — an explicit "how would we know this failed?" test.

## Optional Data Enrichment Extensions

Beyond the core plugin, **8 MCP servers** add live data: DataForSEO, Firecrawl, Ahrefs, SE Ranking, Profound (LLM citation tracking), Bing Webmaster, Unlighthouse (multi-page Lighthouse), and Banana (image generation). All are opt-in; the plugin "works fully without any paid service."
